name: Habitat Kiosk (Pi 5 8GB — sinsera.co kiosk + Claude builds Habitat USB)
description: Same boot as the Sinsera Pi (chromium fullscreen → https://sinsera.co/ on the display, EDID auto-detect + logo screensaver) PLUS Claude Code auto-running on a USB labelled HABITAT (tty2 console + ttyd web terminal) to continue building the Habitat app, with a Build Agent status feed to the dashboard. All session learnings baked: first-boot wizard masked, WiFi country + rfkill-unblock, cooling_fan, SSH key + NOPASSWD sudo, locale, swap. Pi 5 8GB, SD boot (no NVMe yet), PoE HAT, 18.5in touch first display, WiFi.

preconfigured.user: peta (SSH-key, NOPASSWD sudo) + kiosk (chromium tty1) + Claude on tty2/ttyd
preconfigured.display: chromium --kiosk https://sinsera.co/ on the 18.5in touch (auto-detect + scale + screensaver)
preconfigured.claude: USB HABITAT auto-mount → claude --dangerously-skip-permissions in the Habitat app folder
preconfigured.first_boot: one-time `claude login` (in ttyd/tty2), then: continue the Habitat app

notes: UNVERIFIED on hardware. Needs the user to run `claude login` once.
PoE fan needs the fan on the 4-pin header or a PoE HAT overlay (see sinsera-kiosk notes).
